description: Canonical index for the split view pattern. Use Docs.mdx for usage, controls, and implemented examples.

styles.note: Pattern, rail, and story styles imported with ?inline.

widgetStatusEnum: src/components/reusable/widget/defs.ts (WIDGET_STATUS). Issue-list demo uses `kyn-widget` for accent treatment and maps those statuses to preserve the original Figma severity colors.
integrationOrder: Import registerSplitView.ts so split-view-pattern and split-view-code-rail are registered and splitViewStoryStyles is available.
Import design-system components used by your slot content.
Use <split-view-pattern> with named slots pane-1, pane-2, and optionally pane-3.
Optional: wrap end-pane content in split-view-code-rail for a code-rail container.
